description.value: You wrap yourself in a protective mantle of semireal shadow. This grants a number of advantages: you gain concealment (20% miss chance), a +5 competence bonus on Stealth checks, and DR 5/good. This shroud of shadows also protects you from direct sunlight, negating sunlight vulnerability, sunlight powerlessness, and similar effects. When you are in dim light or darkness, the first two benefits increase against foes that donât have darkvision or the see in darkness ability. Such creatures suffer a 50% miss chance (though you donât gain total concealment ) and your competence bonus on Stealth checks increases to +10 with respect to such creatures.
